terms1.title: Journey
terms1.subtitle: NOTICE
terms1.li2: By starting, you accept the terms.
terms1.li3: A PDF will be generated at the end.
terms1.li4: After starting, refunds are not available.
terms1.li5: Access is limited to the defined period.
terms1.li9: Prepare your mind with positive intention.

terms2.title: Responsibility Terms
terms2.li3: You are responsible for your choices.
terms2.li5: AI Guide acts as a symbolic mentor.
terms2.li6: The guide does not replace professionals.
terms2.li8: The journey is an interpretative experience.

password.title: Enter the Keyword
password.p1: The keyword is the secret that will open your journey.
password.p2: Choose carefully, as it reflects your intention.
password.p3: Ready? Type it now and proceed.

dados.title: Personal Data
dados.subtitle: Fill in the information to enrich your feedback.
dados.obs: Anything important you'd like to share?

guide.title: Choose your guide
guide.subtitle: Select who will accompany you on this journey.

final.title: End of the Journey
final.p1: Your answers were received with honor by the Brotherhood.
final.p2: You have planted seeds of trust, courage, and light.
final.p3: Keep walking. The journey never ends.
final.p4: Return whenever you need to reignite your flame.
final.p5: You are the light. You are the change.
